{{Item
| image = Death hood.png
| id = death_hood
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Death Hood''' is a non-dyable equipable that makes your dog look scary.

[[File:Death hood display.png|frameless|606x606px]]
== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| Cape <br>+ Soul Torch<br>+ Coal<br>+ Nether Wart
| [[File:Death hood crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.11.0.
* This item + skin is a direct reference to '''Death''', also known as the Wolf - the overarching antagonist of DreamWorks' 43rd full-length animated film '''Puss in Boots: The Last Wish'''.<ref>https://www.imdb.com/title/tt3915174/mediaviewer/rm77544705?ref_=ttmi_mi_all_sf_87</ref>

<references />
